concepts.title: Hinsberg Test
concepts.conceptBody: Hinsberg Test: This reaction is used for the separation of amines from a mixture. The mixture containing primary, secondary and tertiary amines is treated with an aromatic sulphonyl chloride.

examples.title: The amine which can react with $\mathrm{C}_6 \mathrm{H}_5-\mathrm{SO}_2-\mathrm{Cl}$ to form a product insoluble in alkali shall be
The Hinsberg's method is used for
Which one of the following methods is neither meant for the synthesis nor for separation of amines
